items.title: An analysis of Internet Archive data finds that by mid-2025, ~35% of new websites published since ChatGPT's launch in late 2022 were AI-generated or AI-assisted (Matthew Gault/404 Media)
items.title_original: An analysis of Internet Archive data finds that by mid-2025, ~35% of new websites published since ChatGPT's launch in late 2022 were AI-generated or AI-assisted (Matthew Gault/404 Media)
items.title_en: An analysis of Internet Archive data finds that by mid-2025, ~35% of new websites published since ChatGPT's launch in late 2022 were AI-generated or AI-assisted (Matthew Gault/404 Media)
items.title_zh: 对互联网档案馆数据的分析发现，到 2025 年中期，自 2022 年末 ChatGPT 推出以来发布的新网站中约有 35% 是人工智能生成或人工智能辅助的（Matthew Gault/404 Media）

items.title: Shanghai-based Lightelligence, which makes photonics chips, surges by nearly 400% in its trading debut in Hong Kong after raising ~$310M in its IPO (Ann Cao/South China Morning Post)
items.title_original: Shanghai-based Lightelligence, which makes photonics chips, surges by nearly 400% in its trading debut in Hong Kong after raising ~$310M in its IPO (Ann Cao/South China Morning Post)
items.title_en: Shanghai-based Lightelligence, which makes photonics chips, surges by nearly 400% in its trading debut in Hong Kong after raising ~$310M in its IPO (Ann Cao/South China Morning Post)
items.title_zh: 总部位于上海的光子芯片制造商 Lightelligence 在首次公开募股 (IPO) 中筹集了约 3.1 亿美元资金后，在香港上市首日股价飙升近 400%（Ann Cao/《南华早报》）

items.title_zh: “比人类科学家快一万倍”——新的人工智能工具以闪电般的速度设计了超高效的热电发电机，这一突破可以大幅削减能量采集器的成本，并有助于实现更便宜、高性能的家用热泵
